chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2270 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1.
